name: GAF_GenAI_CreateAgent_Tool_v1
description: Create a new TOOLKIT-type Agent in Infor OS GenAI from a specification.
instructions: Create a new Agent in Infor OS GenAI. Agents MUST use type TOOLKIT. Required fields: name (GAF_<Product>_<Capability>_Agent_v<N> format), description, instructions (short summary), type (MUST be TOOLKIT), data object, utterances array. The data object MUST contain: workflow (detailed behavior), tools (array of tool names), model. Returns: guid, name, type. HTTP 409 means name conflict - use UpdateAsset instead.

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /api/v1/tools
Headers: Content-Type: application/json
Body: JSON array with ONE agent object.
REQUIRED PAYLOAD STRUCTURE:
[{
  "name": "GAF_<Product>_<Capability>_Agent_v<N>",
  "description": "What the agent does",
  "instructions": "Short summary of agent purpose (under 200 chars)",
  "type": "TOOLKIT",
  "data": {
    "workflow": "Detailed agent behavior, available tools, workflow steps, validation rules, tone guidelines",
    "tools": ["ToolName1", "ToolName2"],
    "model": {"model": "CLAUDE", "version": "claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219-v1:0"}
  },
  "utterances": ["example trigger phrase 1", "example trigger phrase 2"],
  "status": 1
}]
IMPORTANT: type MUST be TOOLKIT. utterances array is REQUIRED for TOOLKIT type.
Example Request:
POST /api/v1/tools
Content-Type: application/json
[{"name":"GAF_Test_Sample_Agent_v1","description":"Sample agent","instructions":"Use this agent","type":"TOOLKIT","data":{"workflow":"Agent behavior","tools":["GAF_GenAI_ListAssets_Tool_v1"],"model":{"model":"CLAUDE","version":"claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219-v1:0"}},"utterances":["trigger phrase"],"status":1}]
data.responseInstructions:
Success: [{"guid":"new-guid","name":"...","type":"TOOLKIT",...}]. HTTP 409: Name conflict (agent exists). HTTP 422: Validation failure (check utterances). HTTP 500: Check payload structure matches required format exactly.

CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE:
---DEBUG---
FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
---END DEBUG---
